quote: Fantastic experience from sales to installation. Mike was super helpful on the sales end. We mentioned that our templating might be a little tricky and in response the owner himself actually came out to our home just to make sure it was done properly. Price wise, these guys came in $3,000 less than Colonial. Will use them again and recommend them to everyone.
author: Peter J.

quote: I tend to be picky when it comes to detail, therefore I went to many other retailers before finding Wholesale Granite Marble & Tile. Their knowledge helped me to choose the perfect granite for my kitchen and a gorgeous piece of quartz for my bathroom. Their prices were better than the other retailers I went to. My job was completed on the exact day we were promised from the start. I couldn't ask for a better experience or a more impeccable job.
author: Jacqui Alush

quote: This is my go to place whenever I need granite or quartz. Professional, amazing quality, always. It looks so beautiful in my home — the kitchen, bathrooms and fireplace area. Thank you for an amazing job.
author: Regina Pikovsky

quote: We ordered cabinets and granite from Wholesale. Simon and David were amazing and made sure every detail of our order was handled promptly and professionally. Everything is now installed and turned out just as promised. We used them years ago for a project, went back for this project and will use them for sure in the future!
author: Jason Copley

quote: They were professional from the start. David is very experienced with kitchen and bathroom cabinetry design, Simon is very professional and knowledgeable when it comes to marble and quartz, and Stefanie was very helpful with all the questions I had. The delivery was on time and the prices were very reasonable. I highly recommend!
author: Nataly Levi

quote: The countertop looks amazing! Very pleased with our quartz countertop install. Staff was very helpful in guiding us through the entire process.
author: David Gola

quote: Simon, Dave and Brittany were always available and went the extra mile to answer our questions and provide solutions. Highly recommended.
author: Rob Weening

quote: The salesman, Stephen, was thoughtful, considerate and knowledgeable. He listened to my wants and concerns but was never pushy. The contractors who did the removal and installation work arrived early, worked quickly, efficiently, neatly and left the kitchen clean. My 33 year-old kitchen looks new. How wonderful!
author: Maryann Wilkowski

quote: We are THRILLED with our new quartz countertop! The showroom is beautiful and the staff is so knowledgeable and attentive. In our traditional Philadelphia rowhome, our countertop makes a statement and cannot be overlooked. After fully renovating our 100 year-old home, our quartz is still the first and final thing everyone comments on.
author: Jessica S.

quote: I worked with Brittany. She was very thorough from the outset, taking time to understand what I was trying to accomplish for the project. The quote was more competitive than other places and for an impressive range of options. I would definitely go back!
author: Ellen Rutledge

quote: They did a beautiful job installing quartz countertops in my Center City Philadelphia home. The price and selection could not be beat, and when I needed a quick install they got it done in 7 days. I couldn't be happier!
author: Ori Rosen

quote: Absolutely great experience! I had to do most of our kitchen renovation remotely from out of state and could never have done it without Brittany! She was quick to answer my many questions and had my best interest in mind. Great group of people that do great work!
author: Sarah G

quote: Very quick and professional, excellent prices. Was actually stunned how fast they came out and had my finished product. 10 stars.
author: Terence Waldron

quote: Couldn't have had a more enjoyable experience in purchasing countertops. From making our selection in the beautiful showroom, the friendly staff, the template and install guys showing up at the time they said they would, the entire job completed on time — we are glad we chose Wholesale Granite, Marble and Tile.
author: Gary McAfee

quote: I visited many countertop stores and showrooms before finding exactly what I was hoping for at Wholesale Granite. Steve Paparo in Sales was great, keeping me updated and expediting every step from purchase to installation. I love my remodeled bathroom, and my granite vanity top is a beautiful centerpiece.
author: Carla Switzer

quote: By far the friendliest and most helpful granite countertop experience I've had! This is my 2nd kitchen remodel in 2 years, and Wholesale Granite was a night and day experience compared to the huge warehouse place I used before. My kitchen is a thing of beauty, and I'm very happy.
author: Carol L.

quote: Frankly, we thought a granite place on the Main Line would be overpriced. Imagine our surprise when we got quoted better prices than just about anywhere. Steve helped us choose the perfect granite, asked if we wanted to choose the slab and even do the layout before cutting! His installers showed up on time, were perfectionists and left the kitchen spotless.
author: Connie Majka

quote: Wholesale Granite is fantastic! They have a wide variety of products to choose from within all price ranges. Our countertop arrived promptly and was installed completely without a hitch. Steve followed up with a phone call a couple of days later to make sure we were satisfied.
author: Eileen Scales

quote: Our decision was influenced by Simon's personal attention — patient, cordial and flexible — the different types of stones and their thorough explanations, and their reasonable prices all considered. We are very pleased with the professionalism displayed by David, the kitchen designer, and by the overall quality of their work.
author: Gabriel

quote: We have just completed a very large job — natural kitchen and bath countertops throughout our house. Great selection of materials and design. Every staff person we worked with was professional, knowledgeable and friendly. Work was completed on time, finish quality was excellent, and their pricing was very competitive.
author: Glen Loev

quote: Wholesale Granite was exceptionally professional with their customer service, timely responses to questions and concerns, and priced reasonably. I'd use them again.
author: Homeowner

quote: One call to Wholesale Granite and Marble and they had a customer for life! Bar walked me through the process with no pressure to buy. I was able to pick my own slab and even go to the fabrication facility to lay out my own template. I got beautiful stone, exactly what I wanted, at the best price.
author: Nita Patel

quote: I went to eight other retailers before going to Wholesale Marble and Granite. Their pricing was much below every other store I had gone to — we could get the higher end marble we were hoping for and stay within our budget! We had a great experience start to finish.
author: Jennifer Follo

quote: EXCELLENT CUSTOMER SERVICE! My gorgeous glass subway tile, in the color of the Caribbean, is a real show stopper! And the Caesarstone quartz island in Misty Carrera sets the elegant tone I was searching for. The turnaround was astonishing — a week from template to installation!
author: Joan Kirsch

quote: The pieces on display were beautiful, and my contractor told me the prices were excellent, so I had no reason to look elsewhere. The ordering, template and installation processes were all smooth, and my kitchen looks stunning.
author: Sarah Brubaker

quote: We shopped around a bit and found the best price with Wholesale GMT. The service was excellent and the install went very smoothly — in and out in a few hours. Well coordinated team and our kitchen counters look great.
author: Walter Melnyk

quote: From the time I walked into the showroom to discuss a granite countertop to the installation two weeks later, everything went exactly as planned. The installers were polite, professional and neat. I would recommend them.
author: Barbara R.

quote: Gus was our very knowledgeable sales rep and went out of his way to assure we had all the info we needed to make an informed choice. Installation crew was very professional and we are very satisfied.
author: Edward M.

quote: We looked at multiple stores for granite before settling on Wholesale Granite Marble and Tile. Izabella, our salesperson, was professional, responsive and helpful throughout the process. The installers did an amazing job.
author: Scott Waterman

quote: Fast install — 2 weeks from contact to finished kitchen. Very nice to work with and great product.
author: Glenda H.

quote: I have recommended Wholesale Granite, Marble and Tile to many of our customers. All have been pleased with the affordability and quality of the service that the Wholesale team gave them, without exception.
author: Paul McAlary

quote: Simon's guys were prompt, they did exactly what I wanted, worked very hard and did an excellent job. The stone looks beautiful!
author: Paul S.

quote: Excellent work! They measured and cut everything very precisely. There was one section between two walls I was concerned about — but they fit it without scratching the walls. There are no gaps between the granite and the wall although the walls are not perfectly straight.
author: Ginka Nikolov

quote: Swift response. Great follow up. Came prepared and set up appointment quickly. Arrived on time, pleasant installers, great product, well done, cleaned up afterward.
author: Lea D

quote: We had a great experience with the installation of our new granite countertop. Nice people, fair prices and a very good job.
author: R. Rosenberg

quote: The gentlemen that came to measure and install my countertops were professional, courteous and respectful. The counters look fabulous! They were installed within one week of measurement and the workers left my kitchen clean and beautiful.
author: Joseph M.

quote: Very efficient and professional. Very accommodating by making 2 special cuts for me for my window seal and my pass-through window, and delivered and installed these 2 pieces very quickly.
author: Shirley B.

quote: Top notch work! Joe guided me through the whole process and made sure he stayed in touch every step of the way. The countertop looks beautiful! I am very pleased with the result.
author: Terry P.
